description: Composition White kurta made of a blended fabric, has three-quarter sleeves with panel stitch on the cuffs, a round neck with a slit,embroidery on the chest, patterning all over and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash in cold water Dry clean only Classic patterning on contemporary styles by aneri creates this kurta for women. Timelessly chic, this piece will never go out of style. Wear it with tonal leggings and pumps for ethnic glam or with form fitting denims and flats for a casual do. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
